# Corentin Mors – Dev Portfolio (Full)

URL: https://dev.pixelswap.fr/
Email: medias@pixelswap.fr
LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/corentinmors/
Bluesky: https://bsky.app/profile/corentin.mors.dev
GitHub: https://github.com/Mikescops
Location: France

## Summary

Development portfolio of Corentin Mors — Co-founder and CTO of Subnoto (https://subnoto.com). Open-source projects and side creations spanning security, infrastructure, TypeScript, Terraform, Node.js, and web development.

## Technologies

TypeScript, Node.js, Terraform, security, passkeys, confidential computing, infrastructure

## Projects

- node-native-keychain — Native Keychain Access for Node.js (Apr 3, 2024)
  https://github.com/Mikescops/node-native-keychain

- upnp-client-ts — Node.js UPnP Client and MediaRenderer in TypeScript (Jan 28, 2023)
  https://github.com/Mikescops/upnp-client-ts

- Terraform Provider Home Assistant — Control your house with Terraform (Jan 2, 2021)
  https://github.com/Mikescops/terraform-provider-homeassistant

- Vue Virtual Grid — Virtual scrolling grid for Vue.js based on CSS grids (Oct 4, 2020)
  https://www.npmjs.com/package/vue-virtual-grid

- GitLab Notify — Web browser extension for GitLab (March 20, 2020)
  https://github.com/Mikescops/gitlab-notify-extension

- onMap — Instant location sharing (Dec 31, 2018)
  https://onmap.pixelswap.fr/

- Randomuse — Experimental YouTube song looper (Sept 10, 2018)
  https://randomuse.netlify.com/

- Geek Mexicain — Tech news website (Jan 3, 2018)
  https://geek-mexicain.net/

- mySetup.co — Share your own setup (May 2, 2017)
  https://mysetup.co/

- Le Printemps des Grandes Ecoles — French festival (Dec 7, 2016)
  https://printemps-des-grandes-ecoles.fr/

- CODERPA 18 — French departmental committee, closed (Summer 2016)
  https://www.coderpa18.com/

- Bolt.cm Store — Extensions store (Aug 25, 2015)
  https://market.bolt.cm/

- Uniwav.eu — Live weather platform (Jun 2015)
  https://uniwav.samuel.domains/

- PixelSwap Dev — Online portfolio (Jan 28, 2014)
  https://dev.pixelswap.fr/

- Erupsis — Esport gaming, closed (Jan 12, 2014)
  https://pixelswap.fr/entry/erupsiscom-une-experience-une-aventure-une-fin

- GameZone by Ryu — Blog for a YouTuber, closed (Jul 10, 2013)

- PixelSwap — Creative web blog (Jun 30, 2012)
  https://pixelswap.fr/
